item.product: Costco Service Deli Department 63 MEATLOAF SEASONING MORE FLV Pack Size: 4-5lb. Bags Net Weight: 20lbs Allergy Information: CONTAINS: MILK,
item.summary: Potential Salmonella contamination. The firm was notified from their supplier that the nonfat dry milk may be contaminated with Salmonella. Product details: Costco Service Deli Department 63 MEATLOAF SEASONING MORE FLV Pack Size: 4-5lb. Bags Net Weight: 20lbs Allergy Information: CONTAINS: MILK, WHEAT Packed BY: Griffith Foods STONECREST, GA 30058
item.affectedPeople: Product was shipped to the following states: AZ, CA, CO, FL, GA, IL, LA, MD, MI, NC, PA, SC, TN, TX & WA.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
